name: Downhome Cafe Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar.
2. Mash the bananas.
3. Add lemon juice to the mashed bananas.
4. Beat the eggs.
5. Combine the eggs and crushed bananas with the creamed butter and sugar.
6. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
7. Add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture.
8. Add vanilla.
9. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 60 minutes.
11. Keep well, refrigerated. Yield: 1 Loaf.
